markdownRemark.html:
There are these six drawbacks of frequenting festivals. You’re always thinking: ‘Where’s the dancing? Where’s the singing? Where’s the music? Where are the stories? Where’s the applause? Where are the kettle-drums?’ These are the six drawbacks of frequenting festivals.

DN31.8. Six Drawbacks of Gambling

prev.excerpt: There are these six drawbacks of bad friends. You become friends and companions with those who are scoundrels, drunkards, addicts, frauds…

frontmatter.title: Sigalovada Sutta("Advice to Sigālaka")
frontmatter.excerpt: DN31.9. Six Drawbacks of Bad Friends

next.excerpt: There are these six drawbacks of habitually drinking alcohol. Immediate loss of wealth, promotion of quarrels, susceptibility to illness…
